Your Staked

Please connect wallet first.

Levels

V1：10 000 HTD = 5% APY
V2：25 000 HTD = 5% APY
V3：50 000 HTD = 5% APY
V4：150 000 HTD = 5% APY
V5：500 000 HTD = 5% APY
V6：1 000 000 HTD = 5% APY+Bouns+3% Stcok
V7：3 000 000 HTD = 5% APY+Bouns+5% Stcok

F&Q

Pool Weight
Assign your weight in IDO based on your level, The higher level you are, the more tokens of IDO can be exchanged.
Bonus
When users withdraw the staking tokens, they need to pay a 40% transaction fee, and users with a level of 6 or higher will accumulate HTD equally.
Stcok
HotPad revenue will be prorated to users who are above level 6.

Choose Wallet

Connect Wallet

Start by connecting with one of the wallets below. Be sure to store your private keys or seed phrasesecurely. Never share them with anyone.
